records.title: Retrospective survival analysis in canine oncology: a review of methods
records.abstract: This synthetic review examines survival analysis methods commonly used in canine retrospective studies. We discuss Kaplan-Meier estimation, log-rank tests, and Cox proportional hazards models with emphasis on handling small sample sizes and censoring patterns typical in veterinary clinical data.

records.title: Feline clinical trial design: challenges and opportunities
records.abstract: A synthetic discussion of clinical trial design considerations in feline medicine, including sample size estimation, endpoint selection, and statistical power in small animal studies.

records.title: STROBE-Vet reporting guidelines for observational studies
records.abstract: Synthetic version of the STROBE-Vet checklist for reporting observational studies in veterinary medicine. Covers title, abstract, introduction, methods, results, and discussion sections with specific veterinary adaptations.

records.title: Confounders in veterinary observational studies: a methodological review
records.abstract: This synthetic review covers confounding variable identification and adjustment strategies in veterinary retrospective studies, including age, species, and comorbidity adjustments.

records.title: Missing data handling in small-sample veterinary clinical research
records.abstract: A synthetic guide to handling missing data in veterinary clinical datasets with small sample sizes, covering complete-case analysis, multiple imputation, and sensitivity analysis.
